text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I'm in a sports store at<n>the mall
when I come across Silence<n>Suzuka and a few
others.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All righty! And we're here—the fabled<n>Shangri-la!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? Don't you<n>forget, we've
come here to help<n>Suzuka select a new pair of
shoes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka. Are you picky about<n>anything when
it comes to shoes?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess my first concern is<n>usually finding
the right size. But<n>that's just a matter of trying
them<n>on...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I prefer them flexible and<n>soft... I like to
feel my feet make<n>contact with the ground, so the
soles<n>should be on the thin side... And then...<n>Um...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Dang, Suzuka! I knew you'd be<n>part'cular 'bout
your shoes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Lookit these beauties!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this legendary<n>find!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop it... Those are clearly roller<n>skates! And
what's with those odd<n>feathers sewn on the
ankles?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... How do you think they're used?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! You don't know what roller<n>skates are?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, that's not what I meant... I<n>was wondering
if they might have<n>any use for training or not.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon now. Learn to trust your<n>senses. Look at
the feathers. Clearly<n>they're meant to send you
soaring<n>beyond the clouds! Just imagine the
incredible scenery you'd get to see.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Incredible scenery...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Since we're here, you might as<n>well try
them on! Right, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! ...Um, yes, I suppose so...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'll give them a try.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka skates slowly around<n>the shoe
store. As she turns a<n>corner...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, umm, how am I supposed to<n>stop?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: S-Suzuka?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was close! When Suzuka<n>picked up
speed down that slope,<n>then jumped and
performed a triple<n>axel midair, I thought I was
going to<n>faint.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Who knew Suzuka possessed such<n>power... What
fools you are, Spe and<n>McQueen. You've gone
and broken<n>her forbidden seal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! You started it! Good<n>grief... Sorry
about all this, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm fine. Things got a<n>little hairy, but
it was... entertaining.<n>Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank goodness you had<n>fun, then!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. As I thought, there's never a<n>dull moment
with you guys. I really<n>mean it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Let's keep the fun going<n>and continue
our search for Suzuka's<n>perfect shoes!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. Okay, then. Shall we—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly! You won't believe it, I've<n>struck gold
again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Which can only mean you've found<n>some other
oddity—oh wait, those look<n>rather nice.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, duh. Everyone knows that when<n>shopping
for shoes, you're supposed<n>to choose something
flexible, soft,<n>and with soles on the thin side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! You just repeated what<n>Suzuka said in the
beginning, word for<n>word!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka, come here for a second!<n>I found
these in just the right size—oh,<n>and they have
carrot decals!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Okay, I'm coming.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the choices I have... I'd<n>never have
noticed this many if I<n>came here alone. But thanks
to you<n>all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now I'm curious to try them on.<n>I wonder
what kind of scenery I'll be<n>able to see... running
with the shoes<n>everyone chose.
